title: Adventurous Create
description: Modpack that includes Create and many other adventure focused mods.
body:
Modpack based on Create and expanded with adventurous mods to increase exploration enjoyment.
With many different decoration and furniture mods, this pack is mainly put together for players who enjoy building. Create adds immersive automation to this pack allowing players to scale up their means of production.

# Mods Included:
## Create:
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Bells & Whistles
- Create Copycats+
- Create Steam 'n' Rails
- Create Waystones Recipes

## Exploration:
- Artifacts
- Biome Particle Weather
- Waystones
- Waystones Teleport Pets
- When Dungeons Arise
- When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas
- Willian Wythers' Overhauled Overworld
- YUNG's Better Desert Temples
- YUNG's Better Dungeons
- YUNG's Better End Island
- YUNG's Better Jungle Temples
- YUNG's Better Mineshafts
- YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses
- YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments
- YUNG's Better Strongholds
- YUNG's Better Witch Huts
- YUNG's Bridges
- YUNG's Cave Biomes
- YUNG's Extras

## Additional Mobs:
- Alex's Mobs
- Critters and Companions
- Ecologics
- Naturalist
- Ribbits

## Farming & Food:

- Cooking for Blockheads
- Croptopia

- Amendements
- Chipped
- Handcrafted
- Macaw's Doors

- Macaw's Holidays

## Storage:

## Fun Mods:
